articles.title: Warsh Taps Ex-BOE Chief King for New Fed Communications Task Force
articles.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh has tapped former Bank of England Governor Mervyn King to co-chair the US central bank’s new task force on communications.

articles.title: Stocks Bounce on Manufacturing, Warsh’s Remarks: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: Signs of economic strength alongside easing price pressures spurred a rebound in stocks, with Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh saying inflation risks have come down.

articles.title: UAE Oil Flows Hit Pre-War Levels on Dark Ships and Hormuz Bypass
articles.summary: The United United Arab Emirates has restored its oil exports to pre-war levels by sneaking tankers through the Strait of Hormuz undetected and using a pipeline that bypasses the waterway.
